name: misana-hero-animation
description: Looping phone animation for the MiSana landing page hero

scripts.build: npm run build-hero && npm run build-prepare
scripts.build-hero: npm run build-hero-webm && npm run build-hero-mp4
scripts.build-hero-webm: remotion render HeroPhone ../hero-phone.webm --codec vp9 --pixel-format yuva420p --image-format png
scripts.build-prepare: npm run build-prepare-webm && npm run build-prepare-mp4
scripts.build-prepare-webm: remotion render PrepareAppointment ../hero-prepare.webm --codec vp9 --pixel-format yuva420p --image-format png
